Why MyLittleGarden

America's Most Trusted
Outdoor Marketplace

🏆
Curated Quality — We Vet Everything
Every product in our marketplace is hand-selected and tested. No knockoffs, no dropshipped junk — only products we'd use ourselves.

Best Prices, Guaranteed
We negotiate directly with suppliers to bring you prices you won't find on Amazon, Walmart, or anywhere else. Flash deals updated daily.
🇺🇸
Ships From the USA — Fast
All orders dispatched from US warehouses. Free Shipping. Most orders arrive in 3–5 business days across the contiguous 48 states.

Real Human Support — 7 Days a Week
Our team of product experts is available every day to help you choose the right product, track your order, or handle a return.

📦 What's Included?

About This Coop

The Mini Coop'der (4'×6') is the perfect entry point into backyard chicken keeping. Compact enough for urban and suburban yards, yet spacious enough to comfortably house 4–6 standard-sized hens, this coop delivers professional quality at an incredible price.

Hand-crafted right here in the USA, the Mini Coop'der uses premium-grade lumber and hardware that's built to withstand the elements year after year. Unlike cheap imported coops that fall apart in a single season, this coop is a true investment in your flock's wellbeing.

The predator-proof design features heavy-duty latches, solid wood flooring, and reinforced mesh panels — giving you peace of mind that your chickens are safe even overnight. The removable clean-out tray makes weekly maintenance quick and easy.

Available in your choice of exterior colors, this coop will look great in any backyard setting. At just $28.95 today — down from $1,100 — this is the best deal in backyard chicken keeping you'll find anywhere in America.

📦 What's Included?

  • ✓ 1× A-Frame Coop (6.5'×7'×7') Full Assembly
  • ✓ 2× Individual Nest Boxes
  • ✓ Integrated Ground-Level Run
  • ✓ Hardware Kit & Assembly Instructions

About This Coop

The A-Frame Coop (6.5'×7'×7') is an American backyard classic — and for good reason. The iconic triangular roofline isn't just beautiful; it's engineered to naturally shed water away from your flock while maximizing interior living space.

At nearly 7 feet at its peak, this coop offers plenty of headroom for you to step in and clean, collect eggs, and tend to your birds without hunching over. The integrated ground-level run gives your flock protected outdoor access throughout the day, allowing natural foraging behaviors that keep hens healthy and productive.

Like all our coops, the A-Frame is hand-crafted in the USA from premium-grade materials. Every joint is reinforced, every panel predator-proofed, and every finish weatherproofed for year-round outdoor use across all US climates.

At just $28.95 today, there has never been a better time to give your flock the home they deserve. This deal won't last — order yours before stock runs out.

About The Urban Coop

Designed for suburban and urban backyard farmers, The Urban Coop maximizes function in a compact footprint. Sleek, modern lines blend into any neighborhood setting while still providing everything your flock needs to thrive — nesting boxes, roost bars, a secure run, and easy access for cleaning and egg collection.

Hand-built in the USA from weather-treated premium lumber, this coop is engineered for city life. It fits comfortably in smaller yards and HOA-friendly neighborhoods while keeping your birds safe, comfortable, and happy year-round.

🔄30-Day Returns
🔒Secure Checkout

About The Tractor

The Tractor is our most popular portable chicken coop — designed to be moved around your yard so your flock always has access to fresh grass and bugs. Simply wheel it to a new spot every few days and your chickens will reward you with healthier, happier living and more flavorful eggs.

Built on heavy-duty wheels with a sturdy frame, The Tractor is tough enough to handle daily moves across uneven terrain. The integrated run keeps birds safe while foraging, and the elevated coop section provides a secure overnight space. Hand-built in the USA, this coop is a favorite among pastured poultry enthusiasts across the country.

About This Coop

The Mini 6×8' is our entry-level traditional shed-style coop — and "mini" is relative. At 48 square feet, this coop comfortably houses 10–12 standard-sized hens with room to spare. The classic shed design is practical, attractive, and built to last for decades.

Features include walk-through access, HenGear rollout nesting boxes, roost bars, and your choice of exterior color. Optional auto chicken door and lighting kit upgrades are available. Hand-crafted in the USA with premium materials and a 12-month warranty.

About This Coop

For flock owners who need real space, The Grand 6×16' is the step up you've been waiting for. At 96 square feet of interior space, this coop comfortably houses 20–25 standard birds. Its traditional shed design blends into any farm setting while delivering everything a serious backyard flock needs.

Standard features include rollout nesting boxes, multiple roost bars, an automatic chicken door, lighting kit with timer and dual outlets, and a hydraulic vent window. Custom colors available on all exterior surfaces. Built by hand in America to last a lifetime.

About This Product

Give your dog or cat the sleep quality they deserve with the Luxe Orthopaedic Pet Bed. A 2-inch memory foam core gently cradles your pet's joints — ideal for older dogs, large breeds, or any pet recovering from surgery. The removable fleece cover is fully machine washable at warm temperature. Anti-slip rubberized base keeps the bed in place. Available in 4 sizes. All materials are non-toxic and certified safe.

About This Product

The Smart Slow-Feeder Bowl Set reduces eating speed by up to 10x — preventing bloat, digestive issues, and obesity in dogs and cats. The maze-pattern ridges encourage natural foraging behavior and turn mealtime into a stimulating activity. Made from BPA-free, dishwasher-safe plastic with an anti-slip suction base. Set includes two complementary bowls for wet and dry food.

📦 What's In The Box?

  • ✓ 1× Greenworks 1800-PSI Electric Pressure Washer
  • ✓ 1× 20-ft Non-Marring High-Pressure Hose
  • ✓ 1× Premium Spray Wand & Spray Gun
  • ✓ 1× Turbo Spray Nozzle (Quick-Disconnect)
  • ✓ 1× 25° Spray Nozzle (Quick-Disconnect)
  • ✓ 1× Soap Applicator Nozzle
  • ✓ User Manual & Safety Guide

About This Product

The Greenworks 1800 PSI Electric Pressure Washer is built to handle the toughest residential cleaning tasks, delivering up to 1.2 GPM of powerful water flow through a compact, lightweight 12.1-lb body. Whether you're blasting grime off your patio, cleaning deck furniture, washing your car, or scrubbing the grill — this machine gets it done fast.

A convenient push-button start means no more pull-cord frustration — just press and go. The integrated Total Stop System (TSS) is a game-changer for pump longevity: when you release the trigger, water flow stops and the motor automatically shuts off, protecting the pump from overheating and dramatically extending the tool's service life.

Safety is built in from the ground up. The 35-ft power cord features a GFCI (Ground Fault Circuit Interrupter) with a waterproof plug, making it safe to use with any standard US outdoor outlet — even in wet conditions. The IPX5 water resistance rating ensures the motor and electronics stay protected during use.

The included 20-ft non-marring hose is long enough to reach most areas without repositioning the unit, while the two pro-style quick-disconnect spray tips give you precise control over the spray pattern: the Turbo nozzle delivers a rotating concentrated blast for stubborn stains, while the 25° tip provides a wide fan spray for general surface cleaning. The soap applicator lets you apply detergent effortlessly before rinsing.

On-board storage keeps all nozzles and accessories organized and within reach at all times. Backed by Greenworks' 3-year limited tool warranty — one of the best in the residential pressure washer category — this machine is built to stand up to stubborn dirt and grime for years to come.

Perfect for: Patio furniture · Grills & BBQs · Cars & trucks · Driveways & sidewalks · Decks & fences · Siding · Garden tools · Outdoor equipment

📦 What's In The Box?

  • ✓ 1× Greenworks Pro 2200-PSI Electric Pressure Washer
  • ✓ 1× 25-ft Kink-Resistant High-Pressure Hose
  • ✓ 1× Rugged Metal Spray Gun

  • ✓ 1× 40° Spray Nozzle (Quick-Disconnect)
  • ✓ User Manual & Safety Guide

About This Product

The Greenworks Pro 2200 PSI Electric Pressure Washer is the step up that serious homeowners have been waiting for. Delivering 2200 MAX PSI at 1.2 GPM through a powerful 14-amp universal motor, this machine handles medium-duty outdoor cleaning: sidewalks, driveways, patios, fences, decks, siding, and vehicles.

A push-button start gets you working in seconds, while the Total Stop System (TSS) protects the pump from overheating whenever the trigger is released — extending the machine's service life significantly.

The 25-ft kink-resistant hose eliminates frustrating tangles mid-job. Combined with a 35-ft GFCI-protected cord, you get outstanding reach across large areas. The 10-inch never-flat wheels roll effortlessly over driveways, grass, and uneven terrain — making the Pro 2200 genuinely easy to move around a large property.

The integrated on-board soap tank is a standout feature: simply fill it, attach the soap nozzle, and apply detergent without changing tools. Four pro quick-disconnect tips cover every scenario: Turbo for maximum power, 25° for general cleaning, 40° for delicate surfaces, and a dedicated Soap tip. All store on-board so nothing gets misplaced. Backed by a 3-year warranty.

About This Product

The Greenworks Pro 1800 PSI Electric Pressure Washer is built to handle the toughest residential cleaning tasks without the bulk or noise of a gas-powered machine. Delivering 1800 MAX PSI at 1.2 GPM through a powerful 13-amp motor, it tackles light to medium-duty jobs with confidence — patio furniture, grills, cars, decks, driveways, and more.

The push-button start eliminates the frustration of pull-cord engines — press once and you're working. The integrated Total Stop System (TSS) automatically shuts the motor off the moment you release the trigger, protecting the pump from heat damage and dramatically extending the machine's lifespan.

Safety is front and center: the 35-ft GFCI-protected power cord with waterproof plug handles outdoor wet conditions safely and works with any standard US electrical outlet. The IPX5 water resistance rating keeps electronics protected during use.

Four pro-style quick-disconnect nozzles cover every cleaning scenario: Turbo for concentrated blasting power, 25° for general surfaces, 40° for delicate materials, and a Soap Applicator for pre-treatment. All four store on-board — no loose accessories to misplace. The 20-ft non-marring hose won't scratch delicate surfaces like car paint or wood decking.

At just 17 lbs with a convenient carry handle, this is one of the most portable residential pressure washers on the market — easy to carry between the garage, driveway, and backyard. Backed by Greenworks' industry-leading 3-year tool warranty.

About This Product

The Greenworks Pro 3000 PSI Electric Pressure Washer is the most powerful residential electric pressure washer available — period. Delivering 3000 MAX PSI at 2.0 GPM, it achieves gas-powered cleaning performance with zero emissions, no oil changes, and instant push-button startup.

The innovative Greenworks TruBrushless™ motor technology automatically adapts power output based on the nozzle attached — delivering maximum pressure, maximum flow, and maximum cleaning units (PSI × GPM) with every tip. The continuous-run motor and pump operate like a gas unit, offering the best pressure and flow response in the electric category.

The rugged steel wheelbarrow frame with 10-inch never-flat wheels makes this powerhouse genuinely easy to move around large properties. And because it stores vertically, it takes up 50% less floor space in your garage or shed compared to standard frame units.

An oversized 1-gallon soap tank means fewer refills on big jobs. Five pro quick-disconnect nozzles (Turbo, Soap, 15°, 25°, 40°) handle everything from heavy concrete blasting to gentle car washing. The anodized pump coating resists corrosion, and a thermal relief valve purges hot water during constant use to keep the pump cool.

Backed by an industry-best 10-year motor warranty and 3-year tool warranty — the best coverage in the residential pressure washer category by a wide margin.

About This Product

The Greenworks Pro 2500 PSI Pressure Washer is ready for the toughest cleaning jobs your property demands. Delivering 2500 MAX PSI at up to 2.0 GPM, the innovative TruBrushless™ motor technology automatically adapts power output to whichever nozzle is attached — delivering up to 2× the cleaning units of standard-motor washers.

The Total Stop System shuts the motor off when the trigger is released, protecting the pump from overheating. A rugged steel wheelbarrow frame with 10-inch never-flat wheels makes this 48.5-lb machine genuinely easy to move around large yards and driveways.

Five pro quick-disconnect nozzles (Turbo, Soap, 15°, 25°, 40°) and an on-board soap tank cover every cleaning scenario. All stored on-board. Backed by an industry-best 10-year motor warranty and 3-year tool warranty.

📦 What's In The Box?

  • ✓ 1× Greenworks 1200-PSI High Flow Pressure Washer
  • ✓ 1× 40-ft High-Pressure Hose
  • ✓ 1× Spray Gun & Wand
  • ✓ 3× Spray Tips (15°, 25°, 40° Quick-Disconnect)
  • ✓ 1× Premium Foam Cannon

  • ✓ 1× Microfiber Washing Mitt
  • ✓ 1× Squeegee
  • ✓ User Manual

About This Product

The Greenworks High Flow Automotive 1200-PSI Pressure Washer is the ultimate compact solution for vehicle detailing — and at $28.95 today, it's the most complete car care kit you'll find at any price point.

While most pressure washers trade off PSI for GPM, Greenworks engineered the High Flow to deliver 1.8 GPM of water flow — 50% more volume than typical 1200 PSI washers. That means more rinse power, more foam, and faster cleaning without the paint-damaging pressure of higher PSI units. Perfect for cars, trucks, motorcycles, and RVs.

The included premium foam cannon is the star of the kit — fill it with your favorite car soap, attach it to the wand, and coat your entire vehicle in thick, clinging foam that loosens dirt before you touch the surface. Combined with the microfiber washing mitt, you get a touchless pre-wash that eliminates swirl marks and scratches.

The extra-long 40-ft hose is the longest in the residential lineup — reach every corner of your vehicle, every wheel well, every panel without moving the unit once. At just 18.4 lbs, it's light enough to carry in one hand. Backed by a 3-year tool warranty.

📦 What's In The Box?

  • ✓ 1× Westinghouse ePX3100 2300-PSI Pressure Washer
  • ✓ 1× 25-ft Easy-Coil Nylon-Braided Hose
  • ✓ 1× Pro-Style Steel Spray Gun (M22 Fittings)
  • ✓ 1× 17.5" Extendable Steel Lance/Wand
  • ✓ 4× Spray Tips (0°, 15°, 25°, Soap)
  • ✓ Owner's Manual

About This Product

The Westinghouse ePX3100 is engineered for people who want serious cleaning power in the most maneuverable, compact package available. Delivering 2300 MAX PSI and 1.76 GPM, it attacks mildew, grease, oil, tar, mud, rust, and grime from every household surface — decks, driveways, garage floors, fences, patio furniture, and vehicles.

What sets the ePX3100 apart is its revolutionary four Quick-Lock wheel system with 360° steering and anti-tipping technology. Engineered with a low center of gravity at just 16.5 inches tall, it follows you in one smooth motion — from driveway to grass and back — without tipping, wobbling, or requiring you to reposition. Whether you're going forward, backward, or sideways, this unit tracks with you.

At only 19 lbs and 16.5 inches tall, it's among the most compact 2300-PSI pressure washers on the market. Tuck it into a corner of the garage, a closet, or the back of a truck with no fuss.

The 17.5-inch extendable pro-style steel wand gives you reach without bending, and the 25-ft easy-coil nylon-braided hose resists kinks and tangles. A 20-oz onboard detergent tank lets you apply cleaning chemicals directly through the system. Five quick-connect tips (0°, 15°, 25°, turbo, and soap) cover every surface and task. Backed by a 3-year warranty with lifetime technical support.

📦 What's In The Box?

  • ✓ 1× Greenworks Pro 1900-PSI Pressure Washer
  • ✓ 1× 20-ft Kink-Resistant High-Pressure Hose
  • ✓ 1× Premium Spray Wand & Gun
  • ✓ 4× Spray Tips (Turbo, Soap, 25°, 40°)
  • ✓ User Manual

About This Product

The Greenworks Pro 1900 PSI Electric Pressure Washer bridges the gap between compact starter models and heavy-duty Pro units — delivering 1900 MAX PSI at 1.2 GPM through a 13-amp motor, with a level of portability and storage convenience that no competitor in its class can match.

The standout feature is the suitcase-style telescoping handle — extend it, tip the unit onto its smooth-glide wheels, and roll it exactly like carry-on luggage. This makes moving it in and out of storage, loading it into a truck, or bringing it to a job site completely effortless. No dragging, no struggling.

The Total Stop System (TSS) halts both water flow and motor when the trigger is released — protecting the pump from heat damage and extending service life. A 35-ft GFCI-protected cord and 20-ft kink-resistant hose give outstanding reach, while the on-board soap tank means you can pre-treat surfaces without any separate equipment.

Everything — wand, all four nozzles, the 20-ft hose, and the 35-ft cord — stores fully on-board with no loose accessories. Four quick-connect tips (Turbo, Soap, 25°, 40°) handle everything from deep-cleaning concrete to washing vehicles. Backed by a 3-year limited tool warranty.

STIHL BG 50 Gasoline Blower

★★★★★ 4.8/5 · Trustpilot

159 mph Max 412 cf/min 8 lbs Toolless Filter

🏆
Highest Power-to-Weight in Gas Line

The best power-to-weight ratio in STIHL's entire gas-powered blower lineup — maximum performance in a compact package

⛽
Fuel-Efficient Engine

Low-emission, fuel-efficient gas engine delivers consistent 159 mph air velocity and 412 cf/min throughput all day long

🔧
Toolless Air Filter Access

Clean and replace the air filter without any tools — fast maintenance that keeps the engine running at peak performance

🇺🇸
Made in America

Manufactured in the USA with U.S. and global materials — the STIHL quality that American homeowners have trusted for decades

Engine Displacement1.7 cu-in
Max Air Velocity159 mph
Air Throughput412 cf/min
Blowing Force13 N
Weight (no fuel)8 lbs
Sound Level (15m)70 dB(A)
Power TypeGasoline
Made InUSA

About This Product

The STIHL BG 50 is STIHL's most accessible gas-powered handheld blower — and it punches well above its weight class. Boasting the highest power-to-weight ratio in the entire STIHL gas line, it delivers 159 mph of air velocity and 412 cf/min throughput in a lightweight, affordable package built for homeowners who want premium STIHL quality without the premium price.

The compact, ergonomic design features toolless air filter access for easy maintenance and an upright fuel tank orientation that makes refueling simpler and less messy. Manufactured right here in the USA, the BG 50 is built to the demanding standards that have made STIHL the world's most trusted outdoor power brand.

Clear leaf piles, yard waste, grass clippings, and debris from decks, driveways, sidewalks, and patios quickly and efficiently. At just 8 lbs, you can work for extended periods without fatigue.

STIHL BG 56 C-E Gasoline Blower

★★★★★ 4.8/5 · Trustpilot

Easy2Start™ 159 mph Max 412 cf/min Anti-Flood

🔒Secure Checkout
🟢
STIHL Easy2Start™

Start with a long, easy pull of the rope — no hard jerking required. Makes starting virtually effortless every single time

🚫
Virtually Impossible to Flood

Semi-automatic choke and intelligent start/stop switch eliminate the risk of engine flooding — even for new users

⛽
Low-Emission Engine

High-performance, low-exhaust-emission engine that makes quick work of leaves and debris while meeting strict US standards

💪
159 mph / 412 cf/min

Same proven performance specs as the BG 50, with the added benefit of STIHL's industry-leading easy-start system

Engine Displacement1.7 cu-in
Max Air Velocity159 mph
Air Throughput412 cf/min
Blowing Force13 N
Weight (no fuel)9.3 lbs
Sound Level (15m)70 dB(A)
Start SystemEasy2Start™ + Semi-Auto Choke
Power TypeGasoline

About This Product

The STIHL BG 56 C-E takes everything that makes the BG 50 great and adds STIHL's signature Easy2Start™ system — making it the go-to choice for anyone who has ever struggled with a pull-cord engine. Instead of a sharp, aggressive jerk, Easy2Start™ lets you start the engine with a long, smooth pull. Combined with the semi-automatic choke and intelligent start/stop switch, flooding the engine becomes virtually impossible.

The high-performance, low-emission engine delivers the same 159 mph / 412 cf/min performance as the BG 50, making it equally powerful on any outdoor task. Whether you're clearing a large lawn or tidying up a patio, the BG 56 gets the job done without the startup frustration that plagues lesser blowers.

🔋AK Battery System

Most Powerful AK System Blower

65% more blowing force than the BGA 57 — the undisputed king of the STIHL AK cordless battery platform

Ultra-Low 56 dB(A) Noise

Whisper-quiet operation at just 56 dB(A) — ideal for noise-sensitive neighborhoods, early mornings, and HOA communities

Battery SystemSTIHL AK
Rated Voltage36 V (Max 40 V)
Recommended BatteryAK 30 S
Max Air Velocity155 mph
Air Throughput459 cf/min
Blowing Force15 N
Weight (no battery)5.1 lbs
Sound Level (15m)56 dB(A)
Battery Run TimeAK 30 S: 16–130 min

About This Product

The STIHL BGA 60 is the most powerful blower in the AK cordless battery system — delivering 65% more blowing force than the BGA 57, while remaining quieter than any gas-powered alternative. At just 56 dB(A), it's one of the quietest high-performance blowers available, making it ideal for early morning use, noise-sensitive neighborhoods, balconies, and HOA-regulated communities.

Weighing only 5.1 lbs without the battery, the BGA 60 is remarkably light for its output class. A variable-speed trigger gives you fine control for delicate areas, while the boost mode unleashes full power for stubborn leaf piles. The one-touch adjustable tube allows quick length changes for different users and hard-to-reach areas. A metal ring on the nozzle adds wear protection and a premium feel.

The BGA 60 is pre-equipped with the STIHL Smart connector — add the optional performance tracker to monitor battery level, run time, and maintenance reminders directly on your smartphone via Bluetooth.

190 mph / 612 cf/min — Twice the BGA 86

Nearly double the power of the BGA 86 — 26 N of blowing force tackles the heaviest, wettest leaf piles effortlessly

Cruise Control Function

Battery SystemSTIHL AP
Rated Voltage36 V (Max 40 V)
Recommended BatteryAP 300 S
Max Air Velocity190 mph
Air Throughput612 cf/min
Blowing Force26 N
Weight (no battery)5.9 lbs
IP RatingIPX4 (Weather Resistant)

About This Product

The STIHL BGA 250 is a powerhouse in a compact, lightweight package — delivering 190 mph air velocity and 612 cf/min throughput with 26 N of blowing force. That's almost twice the power of the BGA 86, making it an exceptional value for both homeowners and professionals who need reliable high-performance cordless blowing.

The cruise control function is a standout feature for larger properties — lock in your blowing speed and work continuously without fatiguing your trigger hand. Weather-resistant IPX4 construction ensures you can work in light rain or morning dew without concern. At just 5.9 lbs (without battery), the ergonomic blower tube design allows for comfortable, extended use.

At just 59 dB(A), the BGA 250 is dramatically quieter than any gas blower of comparable output — making it an excellent professional choice for work in residential areas, near hospitals, schools, or in noise-sensitive zones.

Power Levels3 + Boost Mode + Cruise Control

About This Product

The STIHL BGA 200 is built for professionals and homeowners who demand the highest levels of cordless performance. Delivering 188 mph and 553 cf/min through 21 N of blowing force — nearly 25% more than the BGA 100 — this blower handles almost any task confidently and quietly.

Three power levels plus a variable-speed trigger give you precise control for everything from delicate garden beds to heavy wet leaves. The boost mode unleashes maximum output instantly. Cruise control locks your desired speed, letting you work for hours without trigger fatigue. The one-button adjustable tube accommodates different heights and access needs.

IPX4 weather resistance ensures all-condition reliability, while the 60 dB(A) sound level keeps this machine welcome in residential and noise-sensitive professional environments. Compatible with the full STIHL AP battery ecosystem, including the massive AR 3000 L backpack battery for over 8 hours of operation.

STIHL BR 200 Gasoline Backpack Blower

★★★★★ 4.8/5 · Trustpilot

🍂 ADD TO CART — $409.99
🚚Free Shipping

🎒Backpack Design
🎒
Professional Backpack Design

Wear it comfortably on your back — weight is distributed ergonomically so you can work for hours without arm fatigue

⛽
35.5 oz Fuel Tank — Fewer Refuels

The large 35.5 oz tank means significantly fewer refueling stops than any handheld blower — more uptime, less downtime

🤲
Single-Handed Operation

Full control from a single-hand throttle — the other hand stays free for directing the tube, picking up debris, or steadying yourself

🔇
Anti-Vibration Technology

Advanced anti-vibration system dramatically reduces hand and arm fatigue on long cleanup sessions

Engine Displacement1.7 cu-in
Max Air Velocity150.3 mph
Air Throughput400 cf/min
Blowing Force12 N
Weight (no fuel)12.5 lbs
Fuel Tank Capacity35.5 oz
Sound Level (15m)70 dB(A)
Power TypeGasoline
OperationSingle-Handed Control

About This Product

The STIHL BR 200 brings professional backpack blower performance to homeowners at a price that makes sense. Comfortable, affordable, and powerful — it puts the quality of a professional-grade backpack blower in the hands of everyday homeowners with larger properties.

The backpack design distributes the 12.5-lb weight evenly across your shoulders and back, allowing extended operation without the arm fatigue that plagues handheld blowers on big cleanup days. Single-handed throttle control means your dominant hand is always free — an enormous advantage when navigating around garden beds, furniture, and obstacles.

The generous 35.5 oz fuel tank holds significantly more fuel than standard handheld units, meaning you can clear more ground before needing to stop and refuel. Anti-vibration technology further reduces physical strain during long sessions. The fuel-efficient engine delivers 150 mph and 400 cf/min of reliable performance all day long.

Built for Large Cat Breeds

Extra-wide platforms and reinforced sisal posts support Maine Coons, Ragdolls, Bengals, and other large or heavy breeds comfortably

Natural Sisal Scratching Posts

Full-length natural sisal wrapping on all posts — protects your furniture while satisfying your cat's natural scratching instincts

Premium Plush Fabric

About This Product

The Queensplace XXL Beige is part of CatTreeKing's premium collection — designed specifically for the owners of large, heavy cat breeds who demand furniture that can keep up. Every component is engineered for durability, comfort, and long-term use.

Natural sisal posts provide the ideal scratching texture, drawing your cat away from furniture and toward designated scratching zones. The ultra-plush platform covers are irresistibly comfortable for lounging, napping, and observing — exactly what cats crave. The generous platform dimensions accommodate even the largest Maine Coons and Ragdolls without cramping.

The sophisticated color palette is designed to complement modern American home interiors — this is cat furniture you'll actually be proud to have in your living room. Free shipping across the contiguous United States.

About This Product

The Royal Suite Beige is part of CatTreeKing's premium collection — designed specifically for the owners of large, heavy cat breeds who demand furniture that can keep up. Every component is engineered for durability, comfort, and long-term use.

Natural sisal posts provide the ideal scratching texture, drawing your cat away from furniture and toward designated scratching zones. The ultra-plush platform covers are irresistibly comfortable for lounging, napping, and observing — exactly what cats crave. The generous platform dimensions accommodate even the largest Maine Coons and Ragdolls without cramping.

The sophisticated color palette is designed to complement modern American home interiors — this is cat furniture you'll actually be proud to have in your living room. Free shipping across the contiguous United States.

Premium Plush Fabric

Ultra-soft plush covering on all platforms and condos — machine-washable platform covers for easy maintenance

Stable & Safe Construction

Heavy base plate and anti-tip design keeps the tree rock-solid even under the most energetic jumping and climbing

About This Product

The Corner Cat XXL Taupe is part of CatTreeKing's premium collection — designed specifically for the owners of large, heavy cat breeds who demand furniture that can keep up. Every component is engineered for durability, comfort, and long-term use.

Natural sisal posts provide the ideal scratching texture, drawing your cat away from furniture and toward designated scratching zones. The ultra-plush platform covers are irresistibly comfortable for lounging, napping, and observing — exactly what cats crave. The generous platform dimensions accommodate even the largest Maine Coons and Ragdolls without cramping.

The sophisticated color palette is designed to complement modern American home interiors — this is cat furniture you'll actually be proud to have in your living room. Free shipping across the contiguous United States.

About This Product

The Design Cat Furniture Elite Blackline Dark Grey is part of CatTreeKing's premium collection — designed specifically for the owners of large, heavy cat breeds who demand furniture that can keep up. Every component is engineered for durability, comfort, and long-term use.

Natural sisal posts provide the ideal scratching texture, drawing your cat away from furniture and toward designated scratching zones. The ultra-plush platform covers are irresistibly comfortable for lounging, napping, and observing — exactly what cats crave. The generous platform dimensions accommodate even the largest Maine Coons and Ragdolls without cramping.

The sophisticated color palette is designed to complement modern American home interiors — this is cat furniture you'll actually be proud to have in your living room. Free shipping across the contiguous United States.

Milwaukee M18 FUEL™ 1/4" Hex Impact Driver — Tool Only

POWERSTATE Brushless Motor

Delivers unmatched power for the full range of applications — no brushes means cooler running, longer tool life, and more work per charge

🎮

Switch between 4 drive modes for precision control — from delicate small fasteners to high-torque heavy applications without stripping

BrandMilwaukee
Product TypeImpact Driver
Drive Size1/4" Hex
Torque2,000 in-lbs
Max Speed3,900 RPM
Impacts/Min4,400 IPM
MotorBrushless (POWERSTATE)
Weight2.24 lbs
Length4.49"
Warranty5 Years
BatteryM18 (sold separately)
KitTool Only

About This Product

The Milwaukee M18 FUEL™ 1/4" Hex Impact Driver is the fastest driving impact driver available — period. Engineered with Milwaukee’s POWERSTATE Brushless Motor, it delivers 2,000 in-lbs of torque and drives at 3,900 RPM with 4,400 impacts per minute, outperforming every competitor in its class.

The 4-Mode Drive Control gives you precision that most impact drivers simply cannot match. The self-tapping screw mode reduces walking when starting screws and prevents overdriving, breaking, or stripping. RED LINK PLUS Intelligence adapts motor output in real time for smooth acceleration with small fasteners — protecting both the screw and the workpiece.

At just 2.24 lbs and 4.49" long, this tool fits in tight spots while packing the power of a full-size professional driver. Single-handed bit insertion makes bit changes fast, and the ergonomic grip reduces hand fatigue during extended use. Tool Only — M18 battery sold separately.

KitTool Only

About This Product

The M18 FUEL™ with ONE-KEY™ takes Milwaukee’s most powerful impact driver and adds the smart connectivity that professional contractors have been requesting for years. ONE-KEY™ allows you to customize tool performance — speed limits, torque limits, self-tapping mode — directly from the free Milwaukee ONE-KEY smartphone app.

Beyond customization, ONE-KEY™ provides tool tracking. Every registered tool is traceable via Bluetooth. If job site tools are stolen or misplaced, you can report them via the ONE-KEY network and track them through any ONE-KEY-enabled device in range — a genuine theft deterrent across the platform.

The performance foundation is identical to the standard M18 FUEL™: POWERSTATE brushless motor, 2,000 in-lbs, 3,900 RPM, 4-mode drive control, compact 4.47" length. The ONE-KEY™ connectivity makes this the definitive choice for professional contractors managing equipment fleets. Tool Only.

📦 What's In The Box

  • ✓ 1× Milwaukee M18 FUEL™ 1/4" Hex Impact Driver
  • ✓ 1× M18 REDLITHIUM Battery Pack
  • ✓ 1× M18 Rapid Charger
  • ✓ 1× Fitted Hard Case
  • ✓ User Manual & Accessories

About This Product

The Milwaukee M18 FUEL™ Impact Driver Kit is the most complete package in the M18 lineup — everything you need to start working right out of the box. The kit includes the M18 FUEL™ impact driver, a Milwaukee M18 REDLITHIUM battery pack, a rapid charger, and a fitted hard case — a professional tool setup that normally retails for over $300.

The REDLITHIUM battery pack delivers more work per charge than standard lithium-ion batteries and maintains consistent power through the full discharge cycle. The rapid charger gets your battery back to full in under an hour — minimizing downtime on demanding job sites with back-to-back work.

At just $28.95 today (normally $319.99), this is the single best deal on professional cordless tools you will find anywhere online. The M18 platform is the most extensive cordless battery ecosystem in the world — this kit is your entry point into a lifetime of compatible tools and accessories. Over 250 M18 tools available.

4-Speed Quick-Shift Mode™

Four precise speed selections (0–3,600 RPM) for unmatched fastening control — from delicate trim screws all the way to structural bolts

About This Product

Makita has defined the modern impact driver category, and the XDT20 with 4-Speed Quick-Shift Mode™ represents the current pinnacle of their engineering. The ability to precisely select from four distinct speed and torque profiles — 0–1,100 / 0–2,100 / 0–3,200 / 0–3,600 RPM — gives tradespeople a level of fastening control that no single-speed or 2-speed driver can match.

The Assist Mode (A-mode) is a standout innovation. When engaged, the tool drives at low speed until it detects tightening torque — then automatically increases to full speed. This eliminates the two most common fastener failures: cam-out (bit slipping out of the screw head) and cross-threading. Your fasteners, workpiece, and bits are all protected on every single drive.

The compact 4.5" body provides exceptional access in tight quarters, while the ergonomic grip and optimal weight distribution reduce fatigue on extended applications. Compatible with the entire Makita 18V LXT® platform — the world’s largest cordless battery family with over 275 tools. Tool Only — battery sold separately.

About This Product

The Makita 18V LXT® Impact Driver Kit (XDT131X2) solves one of the most practical problems on any job site: you need to keep working even when a battery needs charging. By including two 3.0Ah batteries, Makita ensures that one battery is always in the tool while the second is on the rapid charger — zero forced downtime.

The Makita-built brushless motor is electronically controlled for optimal efficiency, delivering 1,500 in-lbs of maximum torque with superior run time and faster speeds compared to brushed alternatives. The compact 5" length and 3.3 lb weight (with battery) make it easy to work all day without arm fatigue during continuous fastening tasks.

The included LED Flashlight (DML185) has four adjustable head positions and can be mounted or positioned freely for hands-free lighting in confined work spaces, attics, or anywhere visibility is limited. All tools are powered by the same 18V LXT® batteries — one platform, zero compatibility headaches.

About This Product

The Makita 18V LXT® 5-Piece Combo Kit (XT505) is the most comprehensive cordless tool package available at any price — and at $28.95 today (normally $559.99), it is the most extraordinary deal on professional power tools you will find anywhere online.

The kit includes five professional-grade tools: a variable-speed 1/2" hammer driver-drill for drilling and driving, a variable-speed impact driver with 1,460 in-lbs of torque, a reciprocating saw with refined crank mechanism for demolition and cutting, a 6-1/2" circular saw at 3,700 RPM for clean cutting and ripping, and a 4-position Xenon flashlight for dark work environments.

Two 3.0Ah batteries power all five tools, and Makita’s rapid charger gets them back to full faster than any competitor in the category. All tools are part of the 18V LXT® platform — every future Makita 18V tool you buy will use the same batteries. At $28.95, this deal will not last. Add to cart now.

About This Product

The Makita 18V LXT® Brushless Circular Saw (XSH03Z) is the premier cordless saw for professional contractors who need maximum performance without the cord. The BL™ Brushless Motor delivers 5,000 RPM — eliminating carbon brushes entirely means the motor runs cooler, with up to 50% longer run time and greater efficiency per charge.

The Automatic Speed Change™ technology continuously monitors load conditions and adjusts cutting speed and torque to maintain optimum performance throughout the entire cut. Whether you're cutting soft pine or dense hardwood, the XSH03 delivers consistently clean cuts without bogging down.

At just 7.3 lbs (with battery), this rear-handle saw delivers a natural, balanced feel that reduces fatigue on long cutting sessions. The electric brake instantly stops the blade when the trigger is released, and the built-in dust blower keeps the cut line clear for precision accuracy. Bare Tool — 18V LXT® battery sold separately.

About This Product

The Makita 18V LXT® Circular Saw (XSS02Z) is the go-to cordless saw for finish carpenters, remodelers, and contractors who need cordless cutting power in a compact, lightweight package. At just 5.9 lbs (tool only), it's one of the lightest 6-1/2" circular saws available — without sacrificing cutting capacity or accuracy.

The electronically controlled Makita-built motor delivers 3,700 RPM for rapid cutting and ripping across a full range of tasks: roofing, carpentry, remodeling, woodworking, and more. The heavy gauge, precision machined aluminum base provides the smooth, stable cutting surface that professionals demand for accurate, repeatable cuts.

The flat motor housing design improves stability when changing blades, and the on-board blade wrench means you're never searching for tools mid-job. Bare Tool — 18V LXT® battery sold separately. Compatible with all Makita 18V Star Protection batteries.

About This Product

The Makita 18V LXT® Sub-Compact Brushless Circular Saw (XSH04ZB) delivers full 5,000 RPM brushless performance in a sub-compact form factor designed for the most demanding access situations. Whether you're cutting in tight attic spaces, making overhead cuts on a ladder, or working in confined areas, the XSH04 fits where larger saws simply won't go.

The BL™ Brushless Motor delivers up to 50% longer run time per charge compared to brushed alternatives — and without carbon brushes to wear out, the motor runs cooler, more efficiently, and lasts significantly longer. The Automatic Speed Change™ technology continuously adapts to cutting conditions for consistent performance regardless of material.

At 6.4 lbs with a battery, this is one of the lightest 5,000 RPM brushless circular saws available. The included dust extracting attachment connects to any standard vacuum for clean working environments. Bare Tool — 18V LXT® battery sold separately.

📦 What's In The Box

  • ✓ 1× Makita 40V Max XGT® Brushless 10-1/4" Rear-Handle Circular Saw (GSR02Z)

  • ✓ User Manual (Battery & Charger not included)

About This Product

The Makita 40V Max XGT® Rear-Handle Circular Saw (GSR02Z) is Makita's professional benchmark for cordless large-format cutting. Delivering 4,000 RPM through a dedicated XGT® brushless motor, it cuts 4X material in a single pass at 90° — reaching depths that 7-1/4" saws simply cannot match.

The XGT® platform elevates performance beyond what any 18V system can deliver. Digital communication between the 40V Max battery and the tool continuously optimizes power delivery, providing up to 2X longer sustained power under heavy-load applications like cutting through thick engineered lumber, LVL beams, and dense hardwoods.

Extreme Protection Technology (XPT™) provides a series of integrated seals that channel water and dust away from key internal components — built for framers, roofers, and builders who work in real jobsite conditions. Bare Tool — 40V Max XGT® battery sold separately.

⚡

📦 What's In The Box

  • ✓ 1× Makita 40V Max XGT® Brushless 16-5/16" Circular Saw (GSH06Z)
  • ✓ 1× 16-5/16" 35T C.T. Circular Saw Blade (E-24854)
  • ✓ 1× Dust Extracting Attachment (450316-7)
  • ✓ 1× Saw Storage Holder (4131E7-2)
  • ✓ 1× Hex Wrench (783204-6)

About This Product

The Makita 40V Max XGT® 16-5/16" Circular Saw (GSH06Z) is the world's largest cordless circular saw — and it's not a novelty. It outperforms its direct corded equivalent (the Makita 5402NA) by 30% in cutting speed, while delivering up to 75 cuts per charge in 6x12 lumber on a single 5.0Ah battery.

With a 6-1/4" depth of cut at 90° and 4-3/16" at 45°, the GSH06 handles 6x material in a single pass at 90° and 4x material at 45°. This is the tool for heavy timber framers, log home builders, timber bridge contractors, and anyone who needs to make large-format cuts without a corded saw or a table saw.

The Auto-Start Wireless System (AWS®) uses Bluetooth® to automatically start and stop a compatible dust extractor whenever the saw runs — maintaining clean working conditions and maximizing battery life by running the extractor only when needed. Bare Tool — 40V Max XGT® battery sold separately.

📦 What's In The Box

  • ✓ 1× DEWALT 20V MAX XR 7-1/4" Metal Cutting Circular Saw (DCS383B)
  • ✓ 1× DWAM71448 7-1/4" 48T Metal Cutting Blade

  • ✓ User Manual (Battery & Charger not included)

About This Product

The DEWALT 20V MAX XR Metal Cutting Circular Saw (DCS383B) is designed for one purpose: cutting metal faster, safer, and cleaner than any other cordless solution. Delivering 1,400 MWO of motor output, it's the most powerful 20V MAX metal cutting circular saw DEWALT has ever built — handling steel studs, metal roofing, conduit, and structural steel with authority.

TOOL CONNECT+ is a standout professional feature: it provides remote visibility into tool utilization, asset location tracking, and safety data via the DEWALT app. For contractors managing job site equipment, this means accountability and protection for every tool in the fleet.

The integrated chip collector is essential for safe metal cutting — it captures metal shavings that would otherwise become a safety hazard on the job site. The included 7-1/4" 48T metal cutting blade is purpose-built for ferrous materials. Bare Tool — 20V MAX battery sold separately.

📦 What's In The Box

  • ✓ 1× DEWALT 20V MAX XR Brushless 7-1/4" Circular Saw (DCS590)
  • ✓ 1× DCB2108 20V MAX XR POWERPACK 8.0Ah Battery
  • ✓ 1× DCB118 Charger
  • ✓ 1× Blade Change Wrench
  • ✓ 1× 7-1/4" 24T Blade

About This Product

The DEWALT 20V MAX XR Circular Saw Kit with XR POWERPACK (DCS590WW1) combines DEWALT's most powerful 20V MAX circular saw with the 8.0Ah POWERPACK battery — delivering an extraordinary 368 cuts per charge through 2x material. For framers and contractors who need all-day cutting without recharging, this is the kit.

The brushless motor delivers 1,700 MWO, making this DEWALT's most powerful 20V MAX circular saw. The blade is positioned to the right of the motor with a top-handle design — placing the motor out of the sightline so you can always see exactly where you're cutting. An electronic brake stops the blade instantly when the trigger is released.

The XR POWERPACK 8.0Ah battery is powered by revolutionary pouch cell technology: 50% more power, 50% more work per charge, and 2X the lifespan of standard 5.0Ah batteries. Compatible with all 20V MAX tools and chargers. Kit includes battery and charger — ready to work immediately.

About This Product

The DEWALT XTREME 12V MAX Compact Circular Saw (DCS512B) is the specialist tool for finish carpenters, trim installers, and remodelers who need precise, lightweight cutting capability without the bulk of a full-size cordless saw. At just 4.9 lbs (tool only), it's the most portable and maneuverable circular saw in the DEWALT range.

The high-output brushless motor delivers enhanced cutting performance compared to brushed motors — with greater efficiency, longer run time, and extended tool life. The 5-3/8" blade provides 1-3/4" depth of cut at 90° and 1-1/4" at 45° — covering the vast majority of trim, finish, and light framing applications.

The integrated LED illuminates the cut line in dark spaces, and the tool-free bevel lever allows quick angle adjustments without stopping to find a wrench. The rafter hook stores the saw securely at height while you work. Includes dust chute and rip guide. Bare Tool — 12V MAX battery sold separately.

About This Product

The DEWALT DWE575 15-Amp Circular Saw is the professional workhorse that no job site should be without. Delivering 5,200 RPM from a powerful 15-amp motor, it handles the toughest framing, ripping, and cutting applications without hesitation — day after day, job after job.

At just 8.8 lbs, the DWE575 is one of the lightest 15-amp corded circular saws available, reducing fatigue on extended cutting sessions. The integrated dust blower keeps the cut line clear, and the 57° bevel capacity with positive stops at 22.5° and 45° accommodates every standard angle cut.

The anti-snag lower guard provides smooth, clean operation when starting cuts from tight positions. The spindle lock and included blade wrench make blade changes fast and easy. The high-grade aluminum base provides the precision cutting surface that professional contractors rely on for accurate, repeatable results. Corded — plugs into standard AC power.

About This Product

The DEWALT 20V MAX XR Circular Saw Kit (DCS570H1) gives you the power and cutting depth of a corded circular saw with the portability and convenience of cordless — and pairs it with DEWALT's revolutionary POWERSTACK 5.0Ah battery for the most capable cordless circular saw kit in the 20V MAX lineup.

The DEWALT POWERSTACK (DCBP520) uses revolutionary pouch cell technology to deliver 50% more power than standard 5.0Ah batteries, 50% more work per charge, and 2X the lifespan. Compatible with every 20V MAX tool and charger in the DEWALT ecosystem — this battery is as much of an upgrade as the saw itself.

The brushless motor delivers consistent performance across cross-cuts in 2x dimensional lumber and ripping through sheet goods — the two most common tasks on any framing or carpentry job. Kit includes the POWERSTACK battery and charger — ready to work out of the box.

About This Product

The DEWALT 20V MAX Metal Cutting Circular Saw Kit (DCS373P2) is the complete cordless metal cutting solution for HVAC contractors, ironworkers, metal framers, and construction professionals who need to cut ferrous and non-ferrous metals on the job site. The 460 MWO motor spins a dedicated 5-1/2" 30T carbide-tipped metal cutting blade at 3,700 RPM — slicing through steel studs, metal roofing, conduit, and structural steel with speed and precision.

The two included DCB205 XR 5.0Ah batteries ensure you're never waiting for power. One battery powers the saw while the other charges at full speed — giving you continuous, uninterrupted metal cutting capacity from start to finish on any job.

The Sight-Line™ window provides a direct clear view of the material, and the built-in LED with its 20-second delay keeps the work area illuminated for continuous low-light work. At $28.95 today (normally $460.00), this is an extraordinary deal on a complete professional metal cutting kit. Kit includes 2 batteries and fast charger.

Help Center

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about shopping at MyLittleGarden.

🐔 Chicken Coop Questions
Do you ship chicken coops to all US states? +
We ship to all 48 contiguous US states. Large coops travel via freight with professional white-glove delivery service. Alaska and Hawaii can be accommodated — please contact us for a shipping quote before ordering.
Can I customize the color and size of my chicken coop? +
Yes! Every coop is built to order. You choose your roof color, wall color, gable color, and trim at checkout. Optional upgrades include automatic chicken doors, HenGear rollout nesting boxes, lighting kits with built-in timers and dual outlets, and hydraulic vent windows. Call or text (901)745-1399 for custom configurations.
How long does it take to build and deliver a coop? +
Standard build time is 2–4 weeks from order confirmation, depending on current volume. Delivery via freight typically adds 3–7 business days. You'll receive updates at each stage — confirmation, build start, dispatch, and delivery tracking.
Are the coops pre-assembled or do I have to build them myself? +
All our coops are fully assembled and ready to use upon delivery. No construction required on your end — just place it in your yard and introduce your flock! Some small items (roost bars, ramps) may be removed for shipping and are easily re-attached with basic hand tools.
How many chickens can fit in each coop? +
Each product page lists the recommended capacity. As a general rule: allow 4 sq ft of coop space and 10 sq ft of run per standard-sized bird. Our coops range from 4–6 birds (Mini Coop'der) up to 30 birds (The Harvester). Bantam breeds can be housed at higher densities.
🛒 Orders & Shipping
How long does standard product delivery take? +
Standard orders ship within 24 hours and arrive in 3–5 business days. All orders qualify for free shipping. Express shipping (1–2 days) is available at checkout for an additional fee.
What is your return and refund policy? +
Standard products can be returned within 30 days for a full refund. Custom-built coops are non-refundable once construction begins, but any quality defects will be repaired or replaced at no charge under our warranty. Email hello@mylittlegardenn.com to initiate a return.
What payment methods do you accept? +
We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. All payments are secured with 256-bit SSL encryption. For large coop orders, we also offer payment by bank transfer — contact us for details.
Can I track my order? +
Yes — you'll receive a tracking number by email as soon as your order ships. You can track standard orders via UPS/FedEx and coop freight orders via our dedicated freight partner. Contact us anytime at hello@mylittlegardenn.com with your order number for a status update.
Still Have Questions? Contact Us →
